pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requests creating a repository with Key 'gradle-libs-local'. Verified via verifier.py and setup_task.sh.
Task description explicitly requests Package Type 'Gradle'. Verified via verifier.py.
Task description requests Checksum Policy 'Verify against client'. Artifactory documentation and export_result.sh confirm this corresponds to the 'client-checksums' value in configuration.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Gradle repository named 'gradle-libs-local' with the 'client-checksums' (Verify against client) policy. The Artifactory instance is accessible at http://localhost:8082 using the default credentials admin:password.
